page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.24xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this instance allocates exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated, non-shared physical compute resources for demanding workloads.

The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.r9i.24xlarge is designed for memory-intensive applications. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and heavy data processing pipelines that require substantial RAM without the need for local NVMe drives or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.24xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.2 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core, the instance provides dedicated compute resources paired with 768.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio. The server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and complex data processing tasks.
